calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-07-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Arnold W, Evje, Esq. represented San Francisco Housing Authority and Defendant, Yolanda Garay appeared in pro per. Also present, Jon Perry, Property Manager. The case settled per oral stipulation of parties, read into the record. The trial date is vacated.
